channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Hotel in Iraqi capital Baghdad struck as attacks on US embassy intercepted
item.description: No group has claimed responsibility for the attacks, which took place amid the escalating Israel-US war on Iran.

item.title: Trump claims strikes on Iran prevented nuclear war
item.description: Donald Trump claimed he ordered strikes on Iran to prevent a nuclear conflict that would have turned into World War III.

item.title: Trump seeks to delay meeting with China’s Xi by ‘month or so’ amid Iran war
item.description: The US president delays March 31-April 2 trip to China to focus on the escalating war against Iran.

item.title: Ten ICU patients killed in hospital fire in eastern India
item.description: Emergency responders carried patients out of a government hospital in Odisha, India.

item.title: Who is answering Trump’s call for help with Strait of Hormuz?
item.description: Trump has criticised the response to his call to help protect shipping in the Strait of Hormuz during the war on Iran.

item.title: How big of a problem is the Strait of Hormuz for Donald Trump?
item.description: US president frustrated with unenthusiastic response after appealing for help wresting control of key strait from Iran.

item.title: Hezbollah rocket hits a residential building in Israel’s Nahariya
item.description: Firefighters battled a blaze at a residential building in Nahariya, Israel after a Hezbollah rocket hit it.

item.title: Civilians pulled from rubble after US-Israeli strikes on Tehran
item.description: Rescuers have pulled civilians from the rubble after a new wave of US-Israeli strikes targeted Tehran.

item.title: US responsible for deadly attack on Iranian school: Amnesty International
item.description: Rights group says Tomahawk missile likely used in Minab school strike that killed at least 170 people, mostly children.

item.title: Afghanistan accuses Pakistan of killing 400 in attack on Kabul hospital
item.description: Pakistan has dismissed the accusations, saying the strikes did not hit any civilian sites.
